recommendations.title: Zoo
recommendations.overview: A couple trying to save their marriage during a zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Pluto's Christmas Tree

recommendations.title: Man of the House
recommendations.overview: Ben Archer is not happy. His mother, Sandy, has just met a man, and it looks like things are pretty serious. Driven by a fear of abandonment, Ben tries anything and everything to ruin the "love bubble" which surrounds his mom. However, after Ben and

recommendations.title: Gifted Hands: The Ben Carson Story
recommendations.overview: Gifted Hands: The Ben Carson Story is a movie based on the life story of world-renowned neurosurgeon Ben Carson from 1961 to 1987.

recommendations.title: The Cured
recommendations.overview: What happens when the undead return to life? In a world ravaged for years by a virus that turns the infected into zombie-like cannibals, a cure is at last found and the wrenching process of reintegrating the survivors back into society begins.

recommendations.title: Night of the Living Deb
recommendations.overview: After a one night stand Deb wakes up in the middle of a zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Moneyball
recommendations.overview: The story of Oakland Athletics general manager Billy Beane's successful attempt to put together a baseball team on a budget, by employing computer-generated analysis to draft his players.

recommendations.title: Plane Crazy
recommendations.overview: Referred as the actual first Mickey Mouse short. Inspired by Lindbergh's flight from New York to Paris, Mickey builds a plane to take Minnie for a trip.

recommendations.title: The Running Man

recommendations.title: The Returned
recommendations.overview: In a post-zombie world, where the infected live normal lives, their retroviral drug is running out.
